sentences.arabic: تُؤَكِّدُ الدِّرَاسَاتُ الْغِذَائِيَّةُ الْحَدِيثَةُ عَلَى الْفَوَائِدِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ الْجَمَّةِ لِنِظَامِ حَوْضِ الْمُتَوَسِّطِ الشَّائِعِ فِي بِلَادِ الشَّامِ.
sentences.translation: Moderne nutricionističke studije potvrđuju ogromne zdravstvene prednosti mediteranskog sistema ishrane uobičajenog u Levantu.
sentences.translationEn: Modern nutritional studies confirm the immense health benefits of the Mediterranean diet system common in the Levant.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَمِدُ هَذَا النَّمَطُ الْغِذَائِيُّ بِشَكْلٍ رَئِيسٍ عَلَى اسْتِخْدَامِ زَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ، وَالْبُقُولِيَّاتِ، وَالْخُضْرَوَاتِ الطَّازَجَةِ الْمَوْسِمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj obrazac ishrane prvenstveno se oslanja na upotrebu maslinovog ulja, mahunarki i svježeg sezonskog povrća.
sentences.translationEn: This dietary pattern relies primarily on the use of olive oil, legumes, and fresh seasonal vegetables.

sentences.arabic: وَيُظْهَرُ الِاسْتِعَاضَةُ عَنِ السُّكَّرِيَّاتِ الْمُصَنَّعَةِ بِالْمُحَلِّيَاتِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ مِثْلِ التُّمُورِ وَالْعَسَلِ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: U mnogim tradicionalnim jelima vidljiva je zamjena prerađenih šećera prirodnim zaslađivačima poput hurmi i meda.
sentences.translationEn: The replacement of processed sugars with natural sweeteners like dates and honey is evident in many traditional dishes.

sentences.arabic: فَمِنْ خِلَالِ الِالْتِزَامِ بِهَذَا النَّهْجِ الْمُتَوازِنِ، يُمْكِنُ لِلْأَفْرَادِ تَقْلِيلُ مَخَاطِرِ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ وَتَحْسِينُ جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Pridržavanjem ovog uravnoteženog pristupa, pojedinci mogu smanjiti rizik od hroničnih bolesti i poboljšati kvalitet života.
sentences.translationEn: Through adherence to this balanced approach, individuals can reduce the risk of chronic diseases and improve their quality of life.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي نِهَايَةِ الْمَطَافِ، يُعْتَبَرُ الرُّجُوعُ إِلَى الْعَادَاتِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ الْأَصِيلَةِ خُطْوَةً حَيَوِيَّةً نَحْوَ بِنَاءِ مُجْتَمَعٍ أَكْثَرَ صِحَّةً وَعَافِيَةً.
sentences.translation: U konačnici, povratak izvornim prehrambenim navikama smatra se vitalnim korakom ka izgradnji zdravijeg i vitalnijeg društva.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, returning to authentic dietary habits is considered a vital step toward building a healthier and more vigorous society.
